1PM-Mid: Given the courses steered that are recorded on the Events page and the WxS courses steered on this page, the use of 'dittos' for the 1PM to Midnight watches appears to be incorrect.  Again, in consultation with Randi Heikes,  she believes that this was a careless error given that they end up north of their noon location. See Events page for written documentation

8PM-Mid.: Steaming through Unimak Pass 8 PM: Ugamak Island, Unimak 8PM: Course WNW3/4W 8PM: In consultation with Randi Heikes, I want to bring your attention to the possible problem as to the name of the pass that the vessel navigated.  There are references to both Unimak Pass and Ugamak in the watches recorded within the Events page.  Analysis of the recorded courses strongly suggest that it would almost have to be Ugamak Strait.  However, the transcription reflects was was recorded.
